title: The Kozuki Retainers Reveal the Truth
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #8, Raizo, Kanjuro, Kiku, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10 as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kinemon explains the Kozuki tragedy, the twenty-year leap, and the mission to overthrow Kaido and Orochi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We're here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Wano Country-Kuri The ruins of Open Castle

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There's no castle here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "We told you that these were the ruins of a castle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This place is pretty creepy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's because this place has been aban- doned for 20 years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Graves?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Huh!? What the hell are these?!

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: RAIZO...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: MOMO...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Kin'E- Mon...!!

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: Kanjuro!!

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: hup... hey, kiku!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where's she going?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Zoro went off on his own as well...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've been riding on this dog this whole time. I hope he didn't get lost...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Come over here, straw hat- ya!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are their names on these graves!? Did they die!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that I think about it... it's been a while since we talked to them, hasn't it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Where's Kin 'Emon'?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was supposed to wait here for us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He isn't here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And hasn't been here for a while now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He's not hereeeeee!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Chances are, he'll be here tonight.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just as he was last night, and every other night as well.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are you talking like he's a ghost...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Why are their names on the graves!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tell me the full story! Did something happen that you don't wanna talk about!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's not my place to tell you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Oh no, no, no... I'm done for...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't think I'll be able to come out of the bathroom until late at night again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So are they actually alive, then!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...Calm down...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hm?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Heeeeey!! Luffy-Dono!! I'm relieved that you made it here safely!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My apologies for not being able to come and welcome you personally...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Due to a certain blunder, I am currently experiencing intense diarrhea...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Kuduki Family retainer Foxfire Kim'Emon

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Комментар�: http://www.ny.com/watch?v=D=p=1YQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQ

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: THANK GOOD- NESS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Tra-guy, you LAR!! They are alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....? When did I say that they were dead?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was trying to tell you that he'll probably come out of the bathroom tonight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Don't be so mis- leading!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Tap!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Who's there!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: MAAAAAAAA AAAAASTER KIN-F-K

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: DWAIGH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You've finally returned!! 🙂

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been waiting to meet up with you for so long!! I've been shaking in anticipation:) Of your return!!()

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Kiku....! Why are you with them!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why didn't you tell me that you were coming back!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even though I've been so worried about you! That's so cold of you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Is Lord Momo- Suke Safe As Well!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What, so she's an acquaintance of his??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It looks like she's more than that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Huh!? Master Kin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Does that mean that these people are....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah... I'm not sure where to begin, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In any case, Kiku!! These people are the powerful out- side force we've been waiting on!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Iuffy!! SO you were able to make it here safely!!?

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 62 dialogue beats. The Kozuki retainers reveal that Wano’s rebellion has been carried twenty years into the future.
